← 🔌
Equipment

❄️ Air Conditioner

Press COOL or HEAT to turn on the air conditioner. Press OFF to stop it, and use AIR VOLUME plus the up/down temperature buttons to adjust settings.

📺 TV

Use the remote to power on/off and navigate Smart TV menus.

🚿 Hot Water

Press ON/OFF on the water heater controller (bathroom wall / next to kitchen) before using hot water.

🔥 Cooking Stove

Push and turn the knob to ignite. Hold until stable. Turn fully back to switch off. Always check gas is off.

📡 Microwave

Place your plate inside, choose wattage and time, then press START.

🚽 Toilet Washlet

Press REAR or BIDET to activate the spray. Adjust intensity with Weaker (–) / Stronger (+).
